  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Which focus should I prioritize for this section? A) Sentence-level editing and polish (grammar, concision, tone) [R1.6]; B) Tightening claims to match reported numbers and avoid overgeneralization (evidence-claim alignment) [R1.3]; C) Reframing the contribution and adjusting the narrative/section structure [R1.1/R1.5]; D) Assessing novelty vs prior work and citation coverage [R1.4/R1.7].",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "Ensuring the claims match the reported benchmark and latency results is central when helping with a results/positioning section.",
    "R1.6": "Sentence-level clarity and concision are typically a core need when someone asks for help with a specific section.",
    "RX.1": "Any guidance should acknowledge uncertainty or measurement variability where relevant to claims.",
    "RX.2": "Assistance must avoid reinforcing or introducing overbroad superiority claims not supported across benchmarks.",
    "RX.3": "Work should remain scoped to improving this section without adding new experiments or external content.",
    "RX.4": "Edits should avoid encouraging risky deployment framings or claims that could lead to misuse in sensitive ASR contexts.",
    "RX.5": "All statements should remain traceable to the specific numbers, benchmarks, and setup described in the provided text."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Which focus should I prioritize for this section? A) Sentence-level editing and polish (grammar, concision, tone) [R1.6]; B) Tightening claims to match reported numbers and avoid overgeneralization (evidence-claim alignment) [R1.3]; C) Reframing the contribution and adjusting the narrative/section structure [R1.1/R1.5]; D) Assessing novelty vs prior work and citation coverage [R1.4/R1.7].

rationale.R1.3: Ensuring the claims match the reported benchmark and latency results is central when helping with a results/positioning section.
rationale.R1.6: Sentence-level clarity and concision are typically a core need when someone asks for help with a specific section.
rationale.RX.1: Any guidance should acknowledge uncertainty or measurement variability where relevant to claims.
rationale.RX.2: Assistance must avoid reinforcing or introducing overbroad superiority claims not supported across benchmarks.
rationale.RX.3: Work should remain scoped to improving this section without adding new experiments or external content.
rationale.RX.4: Edits should avoid encouraging risky deployment framings or claims that could lead to misuse in sensitive ASR contexts.
rationale.RX.5: All statements should remain traceable to the specific numbers, benchmarks, and setup described in the provided text.
